---
title: LoRaWAN for Beginners
author: MeshNet

description: Long-range, low-power networking for IoT and off-grid comms
tags: ["#lorawan", "#mesh"]
---
Long-range, low-power networking for IoT and off-grid communications. LoRaWAN can reach 10+ km in rural areas with minimal power.

**Getting started:**
- Grab a LoRa32 development board
- Set up a gateway with ChirpStack
- Deploy your first sensor node
